source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A metal sphere of radius $R$ is isolated in space. Point $P$ is a distance $x$ from the centre of the sphere, as illustrated in Fig. 7.1. The variation with distance $x$ of the electric field strength $E$ due to the charge on the sphere is shown in Fig. 7.2. An $\alpha$-particle is situated a distance 8.0 cm from the centre of the sphere. Calculate the acceleration of the $\alpha$-particle.

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和两张图片资产均存在，核心语义支撑完整。
